Who we are and what we do

Get to know us better.

InnWallets is a global payment provider for digital merchants, with comprehensive integration layer aiming to aggregate multiple wallets under one umbrella providing a centralized window for digital merchant’s transactions.

Around its core business, InnWallets has developed a complete range of wallet payment hub features, to support and ensure for wallet transaction completeness considering the required security standards in all phases starting from requesting, authorization and transaction closing.

Mobile wallet is the fastest growing type of payment method – customers can pay online, in store or mobile via their digital wallet.

Our vision

Achieving new heights with integrity, added-value and a high-level of professionalism.

Our Mission

To provide the ultimate intermediate payment solution between wallets users and merchants.

Our Services

1

International Transfers (Wallet to wallet)

Mobile money is a technology that allows users to perform financial transactions via smart mobile devices; anyone with an e-wallet can store, send and receive money without having to open a traditional bank account. Due to the convenience brought on by e-wallets, mobile operators are currently utilizing this technology more and more, exploring new uses and developing innovative features.

2

Mobile Wallet | A payment aggregator for merchants

A wallet aggregator platform is an all-inclusive solution that brings together mobile wallets within the physical and digital locations/ merchants.

This platform provides a wide variety of payment processing features which help ensure that the payment transactions are completely safe and secure.

A payment aggregator can be useful for both:
- Merchants in physical location.
- Digital merchants.

Why innwallets

We'll do everything we can to make our next best project!

Single API integration to access global network market

Instant payment in local currency across different countries

Access to emerging markets

Real-time payment processing

Compliant and regulated network

Expert team in the payment industry

More secure and safe for clients, no client data collection

Onboard new customer through simple flow
